input.command: find /home/jellypai/.claude -name "*.jsonl" -path "*telegram*" 2>/dev/null | head -20; find /home/jellypai/.claude -name "*telegram*" 2>/dev/null | head -20
ls /home/jellypai/.claude/PAI/MEMORY/ 2>/dev/null; ls /home/jellypai/.claude/Pulse/modules/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i telegram

input.command: ls /home/jellypai/.claude/PAI/PULSE/state/telegram/ 2>/dev/null; ls /home/jellypai/.claude/PAI/PULSE/logs/telegram/ 2>/dev/null
wc -l /home/jellypai/.claude/PAI/PULSE/logs/telegram/chat-log.md; wc -c /home/jellypai/.claude/PAI/PULSE/state/telegram/conversations.json
unzip -l /tmp/previous_chats.zip | head -50
input.description: List contents of the zip file

input.command: unzip -o /tmp/previous_chats.zip -d /tmp/previous_chats/ 2>&1 | tail -5
cat /tmp/previous_chats/user.json
cat /tmp/previous_chats/export_manifest.json
cd /tmp/previous_chats && jq -r '.[] | [(.update_time | todate), .title] | @tsv' conversations-000.json 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -40
input.description: Extract conversation titles and dates from first shard

input.command: cd /tmp/previous_chats && jq -r '.[] | [(.update_time | todate), .title] | @tsv' conversations-001.json 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -40
input.description: Extract conversation titles and dates from second shard

input.command: cd /tmp/previous_chats && jq -r '.[] | [(.update_time | todate), .title] | @tsv' conversations-002.json 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -40
cd /tmp/previous_chats && jq -r '.[] | [(.update_time | todate), .title] | @tsv' conversations-003.json 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -40
cd /tmp/previous_chats && jq -r '.[] | [(.update_time | todate), .title] | @tsv' conversations-004.json 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -40
cd /tmp/previous_chats && jq -r '.[] | [(.update_time | todate), .title] | @tsv' conversations-005.json 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -40

cd /tmp/previous_chats && jq -r '.[] | select(.title == "PAI Agent Overview") | .mapping | to_entries[] | .value | select(.message != null) | select(.message.author.role != null) | [.message.author.role, (.message.content.parts // [] | map(select(type == "string")) | join(" "))] | @tsv' conversations-005.json 2>/dev/null | head -100

cd /tmp/previous_chats && jq -r '.[] | select(.title == "Hermes Agent Setup Guide") | .mapping | to_entries[] | .value | select(.message != null) | [.message.author.role, (.message.content.parts // [] | map(select(type == "string")) | join(" "))] | @tsv' conversations-004.json 2>/dev/null | head -150

cd /tmp/previous_chats && jq -r '.[] | select(.title == "Standardising Hermes Agents") | .mapping | to_entries[] | .value | select(.message != null) | select(.message.author.role == "user" or .message.author.role == "assistant") | [.message.author.role, (.message.content.parts // [] | map(select(type == "string")) | join(" "))] | @tsv' conversations-005.json 2>/dev/null | head -100
